title: [Skyship, The Corridor]
description: While the book and parchment-lined metal shelves flanking the corridor continue into the distance, a small, raised dais in the area's center about halfway interrupts the path.  A pile of crimson-hued gemstones sits atop a metal pedestal upon this dais.  A bright light shines down from a hole in the ceiling above the gemstones, scattering thin beams of red light across the floor, shelves, and ceiling.
